titleStmt.title: SII 38.519: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 519. (A.R. No. 519 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the second gōpura, right of entrance, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

summary.p: Commences with the introduction Samastabhuvanāśraya etc., Records an order issued by the ruler to Ādichaṇḍēśvara-dēvarkanmigaḷ and kōyilkaṇakku (temple accountant) and the authorities of Togumāmaṇi nāyanār temple, at Ūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. As per this order the king assigned 921 kalam of paddy at the rate of a kalam of paddy per mā of land, realiseable from two villages, owned by the temple (in-nāyanār dēvadānam = āṉa ūrgaḷ), Śiṟṟalakaikkuḍi and Arindamanallūr (situated) in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, for conducting a service for the merit of his grandson, Visvanāthadēvaṉ. It is also recorded that the endowment was to take effect from the rainy season (kār) of the 27th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . samasabhuvanvāśradha śrīprithvavalvabha malārājādhirāja parameśvaradvāravati pūravarādhīśvara yādava
kulāmbara divamaṇiRead dyamaṇi sarvajña culāmaṇiDo cūḍāmaṇi malarāja rāja malapurāḷugaṇḍa kadana pracaṇḍa gaṇḍa bheruṇḍa nekaṅga
viranaśahāya śura śanivārasiddhi giridurggamalla calasakarāmaDo caladaṅkarāma vairibhakaṇṭhirava magadharājya nirmmulana pā
ṇḍya diśāpaṭṭa coḷarājya pratiṣṭhā cāryya nissaṅga pratāpa cakravartti pośaḷa śrīvirasomeśvaradevarasar
rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇināyanār koyil Ātica
ṇḍeśvaradevarkanmikaḷukkum kovilkaṇakkarum kumārar nam viśvanādhadevaṉukkum naṉṟāka Innāyanā
ṟku ciṟukālaiccantikkup pinpāka nām kaṇṭa sandhikku veṇṭum nibanddhaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatāka (rā)
rājarājavaḷanāṭṭu Innāyanār tevatānam Āṉa Ūrkaḷ mākkalattukkut tiṟappil Iṟuttu varum
ciṟṟaḷakaikkuṭi mākkalattāl nellu Aṟunūṟṟunāṟkalamum Arintamanallūr mākkalattil ne
llu muṉṉūṟṟu Orupatteḻu kalane kuṟuṇiyum Irupatteḻāvatu kār mutal Iṭṭom Ivvāṇṭu
kār mutal kaikkoṇṭu Intac canti mākkalattāl vanta Uṭal koṇṭu pūcaikkut tāḻvu paṭāma
l celuttavum Ippaṭi cantirādityavaṟ celvatākak kalveṭṭik koḷḷap paṇṇuka
Digital edition of SII 38.519 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
